
=== Properties ===
Minimal Height Limit: 7   

Minimal Height: 20   

Maximum Height: 40   

Maximum Height Limit: 50   

Minimal Radius: 256   

Maximum Radius: 320   

Chance: 0.25   

Music: Sunrise   

=== Structures ===
====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.016   

Log: Oak Log   

Top: Oak Top   

Height: 6   

Height Variation: 3   

ID: Simple Tree   

leaves: Oak Leaves   

type: Round   

====Boulder====
Chance: 0.016   

Block: Cobblestone   

Size: 5   

Size Variance: 4   

ID: Boulder   

[[Category:Land_Biomes]]
